action.reasoning: Observation: Current best.pt has no val_bal/epoch keys — likely from iter 4 run. iter 6 was 30 epochs, best val 0.841 at epoch 10, but DRW degraded later. The 20-epoch run scored 0.8351 test. Analysis: DRW with effective number weights is too aggressive; logit adjustment alone is doing the work. Need to drop DRW. Also training plateaus around epoch 10 — long training overfits tail classes. Decision: Run a clean training without DRW, with stronger logit adjustment (LA_TAU=1.0-1.5), keep mixup/cutmix, evaluate every epoch and save best by val_bal. Train ~15 epochs. Then submit eval.
